title: Set GPO
description: Sets the specified GPO on the reader to the value specified.

command.description:
The value for the key command must be set_gpo

Note : 
Maximum number of ports available per device type
1. FX7500 = 3 GPO pins
2. FX9600 = 4 GPO pins
3. ATR7000 = 3 GPO pins

command_id.description: A unique ID that will be echoed back in the command response by the reader.
